text: Customer: yo, my screen is flickering like crazy. Agent: Have you tried a hard reset? Customer: yeah, still toast. honestly if this isnt fixed i want my money back.
Customer: i cant log in. says wrong pass. Agent: I can send a reset link. Customer: wait nvm, i found my password. but can u tell me when my subscription expires?
Customer: my order #123 says delivered but i dont see it. Agent: Let me check the GPS. Customer: actually found it at the side door. but wait, the box is empty!! i need a new one or a refund.
Customer: hi, i need to change my email address. also the app keeps crashing on the login page.
Customer: i was charged $50 but my plan is $20. what gives? Agent: I see the overcharge. Customer: yeah, fix that and just cancel my whole account. im done.
